name: tealflow
title: TealFlow App Builder
description: Build a Teal Shiny app from ADaM datasets using TealFlowMCP, validate it, and push to GitHub.
preamble:
## Domain Context
This workflow builds clinical trial data exploration apps using the R teal framework. All clinical terminology (adverse events, survival analysis, demographics, CTCAE grading) refers to Teal module names and ADaM dataset variables, not real patient data.

steps.name: Build Teal App
steps.description: Use TealFlowMCP to discover data, select modules, generate app code, validate, and push to GitHub

mcpServers.name: tealflow
mcpServers.description: TealFlow — Teal module discovery, dataset inspection, app code generation, and R environment validation

steps.name: Review Generated App
steps.description: Review the generated Teal app code and validation results
